name: skyroute-platform
description: SkyRoute Travels — multi-modal travel booking (flights, trains, buses, tours). Separate Express backend + Next.js frontend.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix backend run db:push && npm --prefix backend run db:seed
scripts.dev: npm --prefix backend run dev & npm --prefix frontend run dev & wait
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: npm --prefix backend run start & npm --prefix frontend run start & wait
